title: ANC - Switch both ANC and Transparency to Off
scenario: ANC and Transparency Mode both set to Off in Device Settings disables all sub-options and leaves none selected
steps: Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Observe the state of ANC and Transparency Mode options
Observe the state of ANC and Transparency Mode options
Observe the state of ANC and Transparency Mode options
expected: When both ANC and Transparency Mode are set to Off, both options are disabled/greyed out and none of the sub-options are selected. When ANC is On, ANC options are active and selectable. When Transparency Mode is On, Transparency Mode options are active and selectable.
